action.name: Morningstar
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage.

monster.name: Ettin
senses: darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 12 (17 with Two Heads)

trait.name: Reactive Heads
entries: The ettin can take two reactions each round, but not more than one per turn.

trait.name: Two Heads
entries: While both heads are awake, the ettin has advantage on Perception checks and on saving throws against being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, and knocked unconscious, and it can't be flanked.

trait.name: Wakeful
entries: When one of the ettins heads is asleep, the other is awake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ettin makes a battleaxe attack and a club attack.

action.name: Battleaxe
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) slashing damage.

action.name: Club
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature and the ettin is bloodied  the target makes a DC 15 Strength check and is knocked prone on a failure.

action.name: Rock
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 30/90 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Axe Whirl (1/Day)
entries: The ettin makes a battleaxe attack against each creature within 10 feet.

trait.name: Bickering Heads
entries: A kobold ettin's constant bickering can be easily heard and proves a tough habit to disrupt. It has disadvantage on Dex (Stealth) checks to stay silent but it has advantage on Wis (Perception) checks. Has advantage vs. being blinded charmed deafened frightened stunned and knocked unconscious.

trait.name: Might of Giants
entries: Though squat by ettin standards kobold ettins are as much giant as they are kobold. It is a Large Giant for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: Advantage on attacks vs. creature if 1+ unincapacitated attacker ally is within 5 ft. of target.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: In sunlight disadvantage on attacks and Wis (Perception) checks that use sight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Two Greatclub or Spear attacks.

action.name: Greatclub
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 7 (1d8+3) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Spear
entries: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit 5 ft. or range 20/60' one target 6 (1d6+3) piercing damage or 7 (1d8+3) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

action.name: Echoing Burps (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Tries to let loose double roar but instead sends forth a series of obnoxious smelly belches in a 15 ft. cone. Each creature in the area: 10 (4d4) thunder and is incapacitated until end of its next turn (DC 13 Con half damage and isn't incapacitated).

trait.name: Giant Attributes
entries: The ettin is resistant to the stunned condition, and it is vulnerable to the prone condition.

trait.name: Multiple Heads
entries: The ettin has two heads and is resistant to the blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, and unconscious conditions.

trait.name: Obstinate
entries: The ettin has advantage on WIS and CHA saves.

trait.name: Wakeful
entries: When one of the ettin's heads is asleep, its other head is awake.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ettin makes one Knobbed Club attack and one Spiked Club attack.

action.name: Knobbed Club
entries: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 18 (3d8+5) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 STR save or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn, as the blow knocks the wind out of the target. This weapon is wielded by the right head.

action.name: Spiked Club
entries: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 18 (3d8+5) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 CON save or be poisoned for 1 minute, as bits of rotten meat clinging to the club's spikes coat the target's wound. The target can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. This weapon is wielded by the left head.

trait.name: Healed by Blood
entries: Whenever a creature is reduced to 0 hp within 60 feet of the execrable shrub, the shrub regains 5 (1d10) hp.

trait.name: Like Calls to Like
entries: The execrable shrub knows if a creature within 60 feet of it is evil-aligned or not.

trait.name: Limited Telepathy
entries: Using telepathy, the execrable shrub can magically communicate with any other evil-aligned creature within 100 feet of it. This communication is primarily through images and emotions rather than actual words.

action.name: Burning Slash
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) fire damage.

action.name: Smolder (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The execrable shrub releases a billowing cloud of smoke in a 10-foot-radius that lasts for 1 minute and moves with the shrub. The area affected by the smoke is heavily obscured.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The toad can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Final Croak
entries: When the toad is reduced to 0 hp, it explodes in a 10-foot-radius sphere. Each creature in the area must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

trait.name: Mad Hopping
entries: Ranged attacks against the toad have disadvantage.

trait.name: Selective Immunity
entries: When an attack or effect deals fire damage to the toad, the toad can choose to take the fire damage as if it were not immune.

trait.name: Standing Leap
entries: The toad's long jump is up to 10 feet and its high jump is up to 5 feet, with or without a running start.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) piercing damage.

reaction.name: Death Leap
entries: The exploding toad can turn an attack that missed it into a hit or turn a successful saving throw into a failure.

monster.name: Eye Golem
languages: understands the language of its creator, but can't speak

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The golem has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The golem's weapon attacks are magical.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The golem makes two melee attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5ft., one target. Hit: 24 (4d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Gaze of Ancient Light (Recharge 6)
entries: The golem emits a burst of blinding light, affecting all opponents within 30 feet who are visible to it. These creatures must make a successful DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be permanently blinded. All affected creatures, including those that save successfully, are stunned until the end of their next turn.

action.name: Primal Voice of Doom (1/Day)
entries: The golem intones a disturbing invocation of the sun god. Creatures within 30 feet of the golem must make a successful DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened Deaf or unhearing creatures are unaffected.

action.name: Shoot into the Sun (1 minute/day)
entries: When roused for combat, the golem opens many of its eyes, emitting blinding light. All ranged attacks, including ranged spells that require a spell attack roll, are made with disadvantage against the golem. The effect persists as long as the eye golem desires, up to a total of 1 minute (10 rounds) per day.

trait.name: Blazing Nimbus
entries: A hostile creature that touches the eye of the gods or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 3 (1d6) radiant (good or neutral eyes) or necrotic (evil eyes) damage.

trait.name: Corona of Truth
entries: Allies within 10 feet of the eye of the gods have truesight of 20 feet.

trait.name: Divine Conduit
entries: The deity that created the eye of the gods can see everything the eye sees and can instantly recall the eye to its side at any time.

trait.name: Ethereal Jaunt
entries: As a bonus action, the eye of the gods can magically shift from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane, or vice versa.

action.name: Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) radiant (good or neutral eyes) or necrotic (evil eyes) damage.

action.name: Divine Inspiration (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The eye of the gods inspires all allies within 10 feet. For 1 minute, all inspired creatures have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

monster.name: Eye Golem
languages: understands the languages of its creator but can’t speak

trait.name: Blinding Demise
entries: When the golem reduces a creature to 0 hp, it can blind the creature permanently. If it does so, the creature is reduced to 1 hp instead.

trait.name: Construct Nature
entries: The golem doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

trait.name: Light-Infused Fists
entries: The golem's Slam attacks are magical. When the golem hits with a Slam attack, the attack deals an extra 4d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The golem has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The eye golem can use its Primal Voice of Doom. It then makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) radiant damage.

action.name: Gaze of Ancient Light (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The golem opens all of its eyes and emits a burst of blinding light. Each creature within 30 feet of it must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 35 (10d6) radiant damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more is also stunned until the end of its next turn. A blinded creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Primal Voice of Doom
entries: The golem intones a disturbing invocation of the sun god at one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. The frightened target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
